title: Report Upload Limits
description: The canonical file-upload constraints for Patient Access Batch PA-5's Report Upload feature (docs/29-PHASE-2A-TECHNICAL-PLAN.md §8, docs/33-DOMAIN-MODEL.md §3.3). Populated at this contract's first creation, alongside its first implementation (apps-script/FoundationReports.gs) — shared/README.md's bootstrap exception, the same one Foundation's F2/F3 batches used. See upload-limits.md for why the size cap and the allowed-type list are defined once here instead of being a hardcoded value in each consumer.
